time_ms,beat_position,notes,placement_type,note_type,confidence,instrument 0.0,1.0,1000,4,2,0.95,kick 125.0,1.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 250.0,1.5,0010,4,3,0.88,snare 375.0,1.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 500.0,2.0,2000,4,2,1.0,bass 625.0,2.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 750.0,2.5,0100,4,3,0.82,snare 875.0,2.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1000.0,3.0,3001,4,2,0.91,kick 1125.0,3.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1250.0,3.5,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1375.0,3.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1500.0,4.0,0000,0,2,1.0,unknown 1625.0,4.25,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 1750.0,4.5,0010,4,3,0.79,snare 1875.0,4.75,0000,0,3,1.0,unknown 2000.0,5.0,,-1,-1,-1.0,separator 23.22,243.81,464.40,731.43,824.31,975.24,1219.05,1451.25,1683.45,1892.43,2171.07,2403.27,2542.59,2658.68,2774.78,2902.49,3006.98,3146.30,3274.01,3390.11,3459.77,3622.31,3866.12,4086.71,4330.52,4469.84,4597.55,4713.65,4841.36,4957.46,5085.17,5294.15,5537.96,5804.99,6048.80,6292.61,6420.32,6640.91,6896.33,7012.43,7093.70,7256.24,7383.95,7500.05,7627.76,7743.85,7929.61,8219.86,8347.57,8463.67,8568.16,8707.48,8823.58,8951.29,9079.00,9195.10,9415.69,9671.11,9903.31,10147.12,10286.44,10402.54,10518.64,10646.35,10762.45,10890.16,11122.36,11250.07,11354.56,11609.98,11842.18,12097.60,12225.31,12329.80,12457.51,12585.22,12631.66,12817.41,13049.61,13270.20,13548.84,13769.43,13920.36,13966.80,14268.66,14349.93,14396.37,14524.08,14640.18,14756.28,14849.16,14988.48,15209.07,15476.10,15708.30,15963.72,16323.63,16451.34,16695.15,16822.86,16938.96,17136.33,17414.97,17658.78,17886.49,18274.10,18390.20,18506.30,18634.01,18831.38,19075.19,19121.63,19342.22,19551.20,19609.25,19818.23]
```sql
```
